ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Account__c ), CONTAINER_Account__c <> CONTAINER_Commissioning__r.CONTAINER_Account__c, CONTAINER_Is_Commissioning_Child_Record__c = True, NOT( $Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot update the Account after creation.
